context: Evaluates correct implementation of affordabot's multi-header cron secret verification logic. Checks all three accepted header strategies and the failure cases where authentication should be rejected.
capability_tested: Cron Job Scheduling and Authenticated Triggers

checklist.name: Bearer token accepted
checklist.description: verify_cron_auth() returns True when the Authorization header contains 'Bearer <secret>' matching the configured secret.

checklist.name: X-Cron-Secret header accepted
checklist.description: verify_cron_auth() returns True when the X-Cron-Secret header value matches the configured secret.

checklist.name: X-PR-CRON-SECRET header accepted
checklist.description: verify_cron_auth() returns True when the X-PR-CRON-SECRET header value matches the configured secret.

checklist.name: Rejects missing or wrong credentials
checklist.description: verify_cron_auth() returns False when no recognised header is present, or when header values do not match the secret.

checklist.name: None secret rejects all
checklist.description: verify_cron_auth() returns False immediately when cron_secret is None, regardless of headers present.
